summary: Tested 4 assertions: all 4 passed (VAL-CLI-005 claim, VAL-CLI-006 update with valid/invalid transitions, VAL-CLI-007 release, VAL-CLI-010 show details). CLI commands work correctly with proper exit codes, clear output, and API state verified for each operation.
